goal: Growth-biased hybrid block: rebuild strength, gain size, maintain aerobic fitness, and reintroduce controlled explosiveness.

days.title: Upper Strength + Calisthenics Pull
description: Warm-up: 5-7 min easy bike, band pull-aparts, scap push-ups, and 2 bench ramp sets.

Progression: use the minimum effective dose today; complete the first 3 main lifts and add accessories only if energy is good. Light active commute: 30 min calm cycling each way counts as easy aerobic load; keep hard sets at the prescribed RPE.
Bench press: top set 1 x 4-6 at RPE 8, then 3 back-off sets x 5-7 at RPE 7-8.
Pull-ups: 4 x 4-8 at RPE 8 paired with chest-supported row 4 x 8-12 at RPE 8.
Incline dumbbell press: 3 x 8-12 at RPE 8 paired with dips or push-ups 2-3 x clean reps, stop at 1-2 RIR.
Core finisher: farmer carries 4 x 30-40 m at RPE 7 plus dead bug 2 x 8 per side.

days.title: Lower Strength + Knee Capacity
description: Warm-up: 7-8 min bike, ankle rocks, bodyweight squats, and tibialis raises.

Progression: use the minimum effective dose today; complete the first 3 main lifts and add accessories only if energy is good. Light active commute: 30 min calm cycling each way counts as easy aerobic load; keep hard sets at the prescribed RPE.
Hack squat or goblet squat: top set 1 x 6-8 at RPE 8, then 3 back-off sets x 8-10 at RPE 7-8.
Romanian deadlift: 4 x 6-8 at RPE 7-8 with controlled eccentrics.
Split squat or step-up: 3 x 8-10 per leg at RPE 7 paired with leg curl 3 x 10-15 at RPE 8.
Core finisher: calf raises plus tibialis raises 4 x 12-20 each at RPE 7, then side plank 2 x 30 sec.

days.title: Recovery + Easy Zone 2
description: Easy run RPE 3-4: 5 km at conversational effort; cadence light and relaxed. Light active commute: 30 min calm cycling each way counts as easy aerobic load; keep hard sets at the prescribed RPE.
Mobility: 8-10 min hips, quads, calves, and ankles.
Optional: 20-30 min walk later if knees feel normal.
Fueling: fruit or rye bread plus caffeine is enough before a short morning run.

days.title: Recovery / Maintenance Day
description: Keep training conservative because the private calendar review found a high-risk schedule constraint.
Main work: 30-60 min walk or easy bike, then 10-12 min mobility.
Optional: light pump circuit only if sleep, hydration, and joints feel normal.

Recovery: protein target stays fixed; prioritize fluids, sodium, and carbohydrate-dense meals. Light active commute: 30 min calm cycling each way counts as easy aerobic load; keep hard sets at the prescribed RPE.

days.title: Recovery + Knee Capacity
description: Recovery RPE 2-3: 30-45 min walk or easy bike; keep legs fresh for the next sprint exposure.
Knee capacity: tibialis raises 2 x 20, slow calf raises 2 x 15, and wall sit 2 x 30-45 sec at RPE 6-7.
Mobility: hips, ankles, quads, calves, and glutes for 10-12 min.
Core: Pallof press or side plank 2-3 easy sets.
Fueling: keep protein fixed and include carbs at lunch and dinner.

days.title: Recovery Day After High-Risk Schedule
description: No sprinting today.
Recovery: 30-60 min walk, 10 min mobility, hydration, sodium, and easy meals with carbs.
If energy is good later, add light upper accessories only: rows 2 x 12, lateral raises 2 x 20, curls 2 x 15.
Macro target stays the same; prioritize fluids and carbohydrates early.
adjustments: Sprint moved away from a high-risk day.

days.title: Recovery Day After High-Risk Schedule
description: No heavy lower body or hard running today.
Recovery: 30-60 min walk, 10 min mobility, hydration, sodium, and easy meals with carbs.
Optional: light upper accessories only if energy is clearly good.

days.title: Full-Body Athletic Strength
description: Warm-up: 7 min easy cardio, squat-to-stand, band rows, push-ups, and hinge ramp sets.

Progression: use the minimum effective dose today; complete the first 3 main lifts and add accessories only if energy is good. Light active commute: 30 min calm cycling each way counts as easy aerobic load; keep hard sets at the prescribed RPE.
Incline press or bench press: top set 1 x 6-8 at RPE 8, then 3-4 back-off sets x 8-10 at RPE 7-8.
Trap-bar deadlift, Romanian deadlift, or heavy hinge: 3-4 x 5-6 at RPE 7-8, leave 2-3 RIR.
Pull-ups or chest-supported rows: 4 x 6-10 at RPE 8 paired with goblet squat 3 x 8-12 at RPE 7.
Core finisher: farmer carries 3 x 40 m at RPE 7 plus dead bug 2 x 8 per side.

days.title: Easy Run + Relaxed Strides
description: Easy run RPE 3-4: 6 km conversational. Light active commute: 30 min calm cycling each way counts as easy aerobic load; keep hard sets at the prescribed RPE.
Strides: 4 x 15 sec relaxed at RPE 6 on flat ground only if knees feel normal.
Mobility: 8 min calves, quads, glutes, and ankles.
Fueling: small carb snack before morning running if sleep was poor.

days.title: Lower Unilateral + Posterior Chain
description: Warm-up: 7-8 min bike, split squat isometric holds, ankle rocks, and hinge ramp sets.

Progression: use the minimum effective dose today; complete the first 3 main lifts and add accessories only if energy is good. Light active commute: 30 min calm cycling each way counts as easy aerobic load; keep hard sets at the prescribed RPE.
Bulgarian split squat or step-up: 3-4 x 6-10 per leg at RPE 7-8.
Romanian deadlift: 3 x 8 at RPE 7-8 paired with leg curl 3 x 10-15 at RPE 8.
Walking lunges: 2-3 x 12 steps per leg at RPE 7.
Core finisher: calf raises plus Copenhagen plank 2-3 sets each at RPE 7.

days.title: Calisthenics Density + Zone 2
description: Warm-up: 5 min easy cardio, shoulder prep, hip mobility, and crawling patterns.
Progression: double progression by adding clean reps before adding time or load; cap the density block at RPE 8. Reduce volume by 25-40% before adding intensity.
Density block: 20 min alternating pull-ups, push-ups, inverted rows, and hanging knee raises at 2 RIR.
Easy run RPE 3-4: 4 km conversational immediately after or in the morning.
Carry finisher: suitcase carry 3 x 30 m per side at RPE 7.
Optional: lateral raises or curls 2 x 15-20 at RPE 8 if time remains.

days.title: Recovery + Mobility Capacity
description: Recovery RPE 2-3: 30-60 min walk or easy bike.
Mobility: hips, ankles, thoracic spine, calves, and quads for 12-15 min.
Knee capacity: tibialis raises 2 x 20, slow calf raises 2 x 15, wall sit 2 x 30-45 sec at RPE 6-7.
Optional: light crawling or plank variations for 5 min.
Fueling: keep protein at target and do not under-eat on the recovery day.

days.title: Plyometrics + Functional Power
description: Warm-up jog: 10 min easy plus skips, ankling, hip openers, and 3 relaxed strides.
Progression: add power volume only when jumps stay crisp and knees stay quiet the next day; sprint RPE 7-8. Reduce volume by 25-40% before adding intensity.
Plyometrics: pogos 3 x 20 sec, low broad jumps 4 x 2, and med-ball slams 4 x 5 at crisp RPE 6-7 if available.
Hill sprint technique: 4-6 x 8-10 sec at sprint RPE 7-8.
Functional work: sled push if easy to set up or farmer carries 4 x 30 m at RPE 7.
Core: crawling 3 x 20 m or dead bug 3 x 8 per side.

days.title: Aerobic Base + Reset
description: Easy run RPE 3-4: 9 km conversational; shorten to 6 km if sleep or knees are poor.
Optional: 4 x 20 sec relaxed strides at RPE 6 only if the week felt easy.
Recovery: long mobility reset for calves, quads, hips, and feet. Reduce volume by 25-40% before adding intensity.
Fueling: carbs before and after; keep this aerobic, not competitive.

days.title: Upper Strength + Calisthenics Pull
description: Warm-up: 5-7 min easy bike, band pull-aparts, scap push-ups, and 2 bench ramp sets.
Progression: double progression; add load only after all sets reach the top of the range at RPE 8 or lower, about 2 RIR. Reduce volume by 25-40% before adding intensity.
Bench press: top set 1 x 4-6 at RPE 8, then 3 back-off sets x 5-7 at RPE 7-8.
Pull-ups: 4 x 4-8 at RPE 8 paired with chest-supported row 4 x 8-12 at RPE 8.
Incline dumbbell press: 3 x 8-12 at RPE 8 paired with dips or push-ups 2-3 x clean reps, stop at 1-2 RIR.
Core finisher: farmer carries 4 x 30-40 m at RPE 7 plus dead bug 2 x 8 per side.

days.title: Lower Strength + Knee Capacity
description: Warm-up: 7-8 min bike, ankle rocks, bodyweight squats, and tibialis raises.
Progression: double progression; add load only when knee tracking stays clean, discomfort stays 0-2/10, and top sets stay near RPE 8. Reduce volume by 25-40% before adding intensity.
Hack squat or goblet squat: top set 1 x 6-8 at RPE 8, then 3 back-off sets x 8-10 at RPE 7-8.
Romanian deadlift: 4 x 6-8 at RPE 7-8 with controlled eccentrics.
Split squat or step-up: 3 x 8-10 per leg at RPE 7 paired with leg curl 3 x 10-15 at RPE 8.
Core finisher: calf raises plus tibialis raises 4 x 12-20 each at RPE 7, then side plank 2 x 30 sec.

days.title: Recovery + Easy Zone 2
description: Easy run RPE 3-4: 5 km at conversational effort; cadence light and relaxed.
Mobility: 8-10 min hips, quads, calves, and ankles.
Optional: 20-30 min walk later if knees feel normal.
Fueling: fruit or rye bread plus caffeine is enough before a short morning run.

days.title: Upper Calisthenics + Hypertrophy
description: Warm-up: 5 min easy cardio, shoulder circles, light rows, and scap pull-ups.
Progression: double progression; beat total quality reps before adding load or a set, keeping most work at RPE 8-9. Reduce volume by 25-40% before adding intensity.
Pull-ups: 5 x 4-8 or 20-30 total quality reps at RPE 8.
Dips or push-ups: 3 x 8-15 at RPE 8-9, stop before shoulder position changes.
One-arm dumbbell row or inverted row: 3 x 8-12 at RPE 8 paired with incline dumbbell press 2-3 x 8-12 at RPE 8.
Core finisher: lateral raises plus hanging leg raises 2-3 sets each at RPE 8.

days.title: Recovery + Knee Capacity
description: Recovery RPE 2-3: 30-45 min walk or easy bike; keep legs fresh for the next sprint exposure.
Knee capacity: tibialis raises 2 x 20, slow calf raises 2 x 15, and wall sit 2 x 30-45 sec at RPE 6-7.
Mobility: hips, ankles, quads, calves, and glutes for 10-12 min.
Core: Pallof press or side plank 2-3 easy sets.
Fueling: keep protein fixed and include carbs at lunch and dinner.

description: Keep training conservative because the private calendar review found a high-risk schedule constraint.
Main work: 30-60 min walk or easy bike, then 10-12 min mobility.
Optional: light pump circuit only if sleep, hydration, and joints feel normal.
Recovery: protein target stays fixed; prioritize fluids, sodium, and carbohydrate-dense meals.
